voice_summary: Smart enough to teach you something. Relatable enough that you actually listen.

content_pillars.name: Small Business Growth Mindset
content_pillars.description: Operational truths and reframes for solo founders and small-team owners — the unglamorous stuff that compounds: lead response time, follow-up rhythm, knowing your numbers, deciding what to stop doing. Tone is honest and specific, not motivational.

content_pillars.name: AI Tools & Automation
content_pillars.description: How real businesses use AI today, not in five years — concrete GHL workflows, Claude/ChatGPT prompts that move a needle, automations that save an actual afternoon. Always with the setup cost and the trade-off shown, never as a magic-button pitch.

content_pillars.name: Relatable Business Skits
content_pillars.description: Short character-driven scenes that land a business lesson by being funny first. Founder vs. founder, owner vs. tool, old-school vs. new-school — the laugh earns the takeaway. Never preachy, never punching down.
